title: Just Berries
description: Makes the berries a little better
body:
Just Berries is a Vanilla-compatible mod that expands the nutrition system in Minecraft by adding new crafting recipes using berries.

The mod introduces several new berry-based products that fit naturally into the gameplay in the early and mid-game:
- Berries in Honey 
- Berry Apple Salad 
- Berry Jam
- Berry Pie

The goal of the mod is to give players more meaningful ways to use berries.
